text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Cho confirmed 'closing the Cirrus Analytics acquisition on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3, exactly as we committed on the Q2 call.'"}, {"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}, {"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Vargas states Q3 non-GAAP margin was 19.2%, putting them 'on track to deliver full-year fiscal 2026 non-GAAP operating margin at approximately 19 percent'; full-year not yet concluded."}, {"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Vargas explicitly stated 'we did not achieve that commitment' and now expects GAAP operating income to be negative 25 to negative 40 million dollars for fiscal 2026."}, {"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Cho reaffirmed 'native Cirrus query capabilities inside the Stratus console by end of fiscal Q4 2026'; deadline has not yet arrived."}, {"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}, {"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Cho explicitly stated 'we are not going to hit the end of fiscal Q4 2026 GA target for Stratus Copilot' and pushed GA to fiscal Q2 2027."}, {"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Vargas said EMEA is improving and they are 'increasingly confident that mid-single-digit growth is achievable' in Q4, but the deadline has not yet arrived."}, {"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Vargas reaffirmed they 'continue to expect to fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by the end of fiscal 2026'; year-to-date buybacks are 285 million, target not yet reached."}, {"commitment_id": 11, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}]}
